    摘要：可解釋人工智慧（XAI）方法在最近幾年中已顯示出顯著的成功，能夠識別驅動深度學習模型決策的輸入數據中的相關特徵，增強了用戶的可解釋性。然而，XAI在提供模型透明度之外的潛力在相鄰的機器學習領域中仍然大多未被探索。在本文中，我們首次展示了如何在聯邦學習的背景下利用XAI。具體而言，雖然聯邦學習使得在不共享原始數據的情況下進行協作模型訓練成為可能，但當客戶端數據分佈顯示統計異質性時，它會遭受性能下降。我們介紹了FedXDS（通過XAI引導的數據共享的聯邦學習），這是第一種利用特徵歸因技術來精確識別應該在客戶端之間選擇性共享的數據元素，以減輕異質性的方式。通過使用基於傳播的歸因，我們的方法通過單次反向傳播識別任務相關特徵，實現與客戶端貢獻對齊的選擇性數據共享。為了保護敏感信息，我們納入了度量隱私技術，這些技術在保持效用的同時提供正式的隱私保證。實驗結果表明，我們的方法在不同的客戶端數量和異質性設置下，始終實現了比現有方法更高的準確性和更快的收斂速度。我們提供了理論上的隱私保證，並實證展示了對成員推斷和特徵反轉攻擊的穩健性。代碼可在 https://github.com/MaxH1996/FedXDS 獲得。

    Scientific Explanations in Health Sciences: Causality, Trust, and Epistemic Adequacy

    2606.31616v1 by Martina Mattioli, Marcello Pelillo

    Medical Artificial Intelligence (AI) is widely expected to transform clinical practice, yet the decision-making processes of many Machine Learning (ML) models remain opaque. Explainability has been advanced as a partial remedy to clarify why AI generates predictions, particularly in high-stakes contexts. Despite ongoing efforts, debates on what constitutes an adequate medical explanation remain unsettled. Yet, explanation has long been a central topic of inquiry in the philosophy of science and medicine. The insights developed in these fields, however, have been largely overlooked in contemporary explainable AI (XAI) research, leaving its foundational assumptions insufficiently examined. To address this gap, this paper develops a critical review at the intersection of philosophy of science and XAI. It examines prevailing accounts of what counts as an explanation in the health sciences and assesses their adequacy for informing XAI in medicine, arguing that they provide necessary conditions for a philosophically grounded approach to explainability in this domain. Building on this foundational philosophical literature, the discussion identifies three central axes of analysis: the role of causality in medical reasoning, the epistemic and relational dimensions of medical trust, and the criteria of explanatory adequacy as shaped by the pragmatic needs of diverse stakeholders. By integrating philosophical analysis with current developments in medical AI, the paper outlines principles for designing XAI systems that offer explanations that are not only epistemically robust but also aligned with the epistemic and practical requirements of clinical decision-making, shaping ongoing debates in medical XAI toward underexplored conceptual foundations.

    摘要：醫療人工智慧（AI）被廣泛預期將改變臨床實踐，然而許多機器學習（ML）模型的決策過程仍然不透明。可解釋性被提出作為部分解決方案，以澄清為何AI會生成預測，特別是在高風險的情境中。儘管持續努力，對於什麼構成充分的醫療解釋的辯論仍未解決。然而，解釋長期以來一直是科學與醫學哲學中的核心探討主題。然而，這些領域所發展的見解在當代可解釋AI（XAI）研究中大多被忽視，導致其基礎假設未受到充分檢視。為了填補這一空白，本文在科學哲學與XAI的交集處發展了一項批判性回顧。它檢視了在健康科學中什麼被認為是解釋的主流觀點，並評估其在醫學中為XAI提供資訊的充分性，主張它們為這一領域的哲學基礎可解釋性提供了必要條件。基於這一基礎的哲學文獻，討論確定了三個主要的分析軸心：因果關係在醫療推理中的角色、醫療信任的認識論和關係維度，以及由不同利益相關者的實用需求塑造的解釋充分性標準。通過將哲學分析與醫療AI的當前發展相結合，本文概述了設計XAI系統的原則，這些系統不僅提供認識論上堅實的解釋，還符合臨床決策的認識論和實際需求，將醫療XAI中的持續辯論引向未被充分探討的概念基礎。

    Team MKC at CLPsych 2026: Capturing and Characterizing Mental Health Changes through Social Media Timeline Dynamics

    2606.31464v1 by Kyomin Hwang, Hyeonjin Kim, Hyunho Lee, Nojun Kwak

    Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have motivated their adoption across a wide range of domains, including Artificial Intelligence (AI) for mental health. Given the growing prevalence of mental health disorders worldwide and the limited accessibility of professional care, there is an increasing demand for scalable computational approaches that can assist in early detection and continuous monitoring of psychological well-being. In this area, ongoing efforts have focused on curating domain-specific datasets and leveraging them to develop LLMs capable of supporting holistic mental health analysis. In line with this direction, we propose an LLM-based pipeline for comprehensive mental health analysis over sequentially ordered user posts, as part of the CLPsych shared task. Our pipeline offers a unified framework that jointly enables post-level assessment and user-level temporal modeling.

    摘要：最近在大型語言模型（LLMs）方面的進展促使它們在各個領域的採用，包括用於心理健康的人工智慧（AI）。考慮到全球心理健康障礙的日益普遍以及專業護理的有限可及性，對於可擴展的計算方法的需求日益增加，這些方法可以協助早期檢測和持續監測心理健康。在這個領域，持續的努力集中在策劃特定領域的數據集並利用它們來開發能夠支持全面心理健康分析的LLMs。根據這一方向，我們提出了一個基於LLM的管道，用於對按順序排列的用戶帖子進行全面的心理健康分析，作為CLPsych共享任務的一部分。我們的管道提供了一個統一的框架，能夠共同實現帖子級別的評估和用戶級別的時間建模。

    HealthAgentBench: A Unified Benchmark Suite of Realistic Agentic Healthcare Environments for Challenging Frontier AI Agents

    2606.31179v1 by Qianchu Liu, Sheng Zhang, Guanghui Qin, Jeya Maria Jose Valanarasu, Maximilian Rokuss, Mingyu Lu, Timothy Ossowski, Juan Manuel Zambrano Chaves, Cliff Wong, Peniel Argaw, Yashna Hasija, Mu Wei, Wen-wai Yim, Qin Liu, Zilin Jing, Jason Entenmann, Naoto Usuyama, Tristan Naumann, Hoifung Poon

    As AI agents become increasingly capable of complex, long-horizon reasoning, rigorous and holistic evaluation is essential for measuring progress toward real-world healthcare applications. We introduce HealthAgentBench, a suite of 54 agentic healthcare tasks across 7 categories each with its unique environment. The benchmark suite spans diverse workflows throughout the patient journey and a broad range of modalities. Each task is designed to replicate an end-to-end clinical workflow: given minimal instructions, an agent must explore raw healthcare data, operate within a complex environment, and execute multi-step solutions that go beyond naive prompting. A final task success rate is reported to provide a single, interpretable metric for HealthAgentBench overall performance for each agent. Evaluating frontier agents on HealthAgentBench, we find that overall task success rate remains low, underscoring the difficulty of the suite. The strongest and the most cost effective agent, Codex GPT-5.5, achieves only approximately 42% success rate. Beyond aggregate performance, HealthAgentBench reveals nuanced strengths and weaknesses across task categories. Frontier agents show promise in automatically developing research modeling pipelines over EHR data, but medical imaging remains especially challenging, particularly for Claude Code models, while Codex GPT-5.5 shows emerging capability. Tasks that combine large search spaces with compositional reasoning requirements remain difficult for all current agents. Together, these results suggest that HealthAgentBench provides a challenging and realistic benchmark with substantial room for future progress. We release our benchmark at https://github.com/microsoft/HealthAgentBench.

    摘要：隨著人工智慧代理變得越來越能夠進行複雜的長期推理，嚴謹且全面的評估對於衡量向現實世界醫療應用的進展至關重要。我們介紹了 HealthAgentBench，一套包含 54 個代理醫療任務的工具，涵蓋 7 個類別，每個類別都有其獨特的環境。這個基準套件涵蓋了患者旅程中的多樣化工作流程和廣泛的模態。每個任務旨在複製端到端的臨床工作流程：在給定最小指示的情況下，代理必須探索原始醫療數據，在複雜的環境中運作，並執行超越簡單提示的多步解決方案。報告最終任務成功率，以提供一個對 HealthAgentBench 整體性能的單一可解釋指標。在 HealthAgentBench 上評估前沿代理，我們發現整體任務成功率仍然較低，突顯了該套件的挑戰性。最強大且成本效益最高的代理 Codex GPT-5.5 僅達到約 42% 的成功率。除了總體性能外，HealthAgentBench 還揭示了各任務類別之間的細微優勢和劣勢。前沿代理在自動開發 EHR 數據的研究建模管道方面顯示出潛力，但醫學影像仍然特別具有挑戰性，尤其是對於 Claude Code 模型，而 Codex GPT-5.5 則顯示出新興的能力。結合大型搜索空間與組合推理要求的任務對於所有當前代理來說仍然困難重重。綜合這些結果表明，HealthAgentBench 提供了一個具有挑戰性且現實的基準，並有相當大的未來進展空間。我們在 https://github.com/microsoft/HealthAgentBench 上發布了我們的基準。

    Neuro-Bayesian-Symbolic Residual Attention Shallow Network: Explainable Deep Learning for Cybersecurity Risk Assessment

    2606.30953v1 by Nicolaie Popescu-Bodorin, Madeleine Togher

    We introduce the Neuro-Bayesian-Symbolic Residual Attention Shallow Network (NBS-RASN), a hybrid neural architecture for explainable cybersecurity risk assessment in open-source ecosystems. Unlike deep models that trade interpretability for accuracy, our shallow network encodes domain knowledge, causal reasoning, and expert judgment as differentiable components. It uses 80 interpretable neurons across 12 layers, including a gatekeeper that enforces five epistemological axioms - precision, causality, falsifiability, transparency, and completeness - as hard constraints before propagation. Despite limited depth, the network exhibits deep-learning traits via residual attention and feedback loops, learning complex risk patterns without becoming a black box. It produces fully decomposable scores: a deterministic weighted component plus an expert adjustment, with each adjustment traceable to named amplifiers (blast radius, propagation speed, structural nature, default exposure, exploitation pattern, institutional criticality). We validate on 20 open-source projects covering all OWASP Top 10:2025 categories and language risk classes, achieving confidence scores of 0.79-0.97, and show that explainability is guaranteed by design, not by a training algorithm. This challenges the assumption that deep learning requires deep networks, proving that shallow networks with deep reasoning can outperform opaque models in high-stakes cybersecurity, where interpretability is essential.

    摘要：我們介紹神經貝葉斯符號殘差注意淺層網絡（NBS-RASN），這是一種用於開源生態系統中可解釋的網絡安全風險評估的混合神經架構。與那些為了準確性而犧牲可解釋性的深度模型不同，我們的淺層網絡將領域知識、因果推理和專家判斷編碼為可微分的組件。它在12層中使用80個可解釋的神經元，包括一個執行五個認識論公理的守門人——精確性、因果性、可證偽性、透明性和完整性——作為在傳播之前的硬約束。儘管深度有限，該網絡通過殘差注意和反饋循環展現出深度學習特徵，能夠學習複雜的風險模式而不會成為黑箱。它產生完全可分解的分數：一個確定性的加權組件加上一個專家調整，每個調整都可以追溯到命名的放大器（爆炸半徑、傳播速度、結構性質、默認暴露、利用模式、機構關鍵性）。我們在涵蓋所有OWASP Top 10:2025類別和語言風險類別的20個開源項目上進行驗證，達到0.79-0.97的信心分數，並顯示可解釋性是通過設計保證的，而不是通過訓練算法。這挑戰了深度學習需要深度網絡的假設，證明了具有深度推理的淺層網絡在高風險網絡安全中可以超越不透明模型，而可解釋性是至關重要的。

    Behavior Cloning is Not All You Need: The Optimality of On-Policy Distillation for Noisy Expert Feedback

    2606.30923v1 by Ved Sriraman, Peihan Liu, Daniel Hsu, Adam Block

    Imitation Learning is a natural framework for learning in sequential decision-making systems and has emerged as the dominant paradigm through which we understand language model training. A central puzzle is that, while in theory offline IL can be horizon-free and optimal, in practice online methods such as on-policy distillation often outperform offline methods such as supervised fine-tuning. We propose a noisy expert model to explain this gap, in which the learner only has access to a noisy version of the expert's policy, but wishes to compete against the reward achieved by a clean expert, motivated by the fact that in many applications, e.g. training language models to perform long chains of thought, the expert is often imperfect. In this setting, we show a sharp separation between offline and online IL. Offline learning from noisy trajectories is fundamentally hard: to compete with the clean expert, the sample complexity must grow exponentially, in contradistinction to the clean expert setting where no explicit horizon dependence exists. In contrast, we prove that online interaction with the noisy expert via a novel variant of OPD enables polynomial dependence on the horizon in general. We further show that, under a natural condition on the expert noise distribution, which we show to be necessary for any horizon-free sample complexity, one can obtain such a guarantee, although our proposed algorithm sacrifices statistical efficiency in its dependence on the size of the policy class. Our analysis leads to an alternative loss function that is commonly considered empirically for LM training. We further provide algorithms and lower bounds, and extend our results to the more realistic setting of unknown corruption when the clean expert is deterministic, thereby providing a theoretical foundation for why OPD can outperform SFT when training language models from imperfect teachers.

    摘要：模仿學習是一個自然的框架，用於在序列決策系統中進行學習，並且已經成為我們理解語言模型訓練的主導範式。一個核心難題是，雖然理論上離線模仿學習可以是無限期的且最佳的，但在實踐中，像是政策蒸餾這樣的在線方法往往超過離線方法，例如監督微調。我們提出了一個嘈雜專家模型來解釋這一差距，其中學習者僅能接觸到專家策略的嘈雜版本，但希望與乾淨專家所獲得的獎勵競爭，這是因為在許多應用中，例如訓練語言模型以執行長鏈思考，專家往往是不完美的。在這種情況下，我們顯示了離線和在線模仿學習之間的明顯區別。從嘈雜軌跡進行離線學習在根本上是困難的：為了與乾淨專家競爭，樣本複雜度必須指數增長，這與乾淨專家設置中不存在明確的時間依賴性形成對比。相反，我們證明通過一種新穎的政策蒸餾變體與嘈雜專家進行在線互動可以在一般情況下實現多項式的時間依賴性。我們進一步表明，在對專家噪聲分佈的自然條件下，我們證明這對於任何無時間依賴的樣本複雜度都是必要的，可以獲得這樣的保證，儘管我們提出的算法在其對政策類別大小的依賴性上犧牲了統計效率。我們的分析導致了一個替代損失函數，這在語言模型訓練中通常被實證考慮。我們還提供了算法和下界，並將我們的結果擴展到當乾淨專家是確定性時的未知腐敗的更現實情境，從而為為什麼政策蒸餾在從不完美教師訓練語言模型時能超越監督微調提供了理論基礎。

    When transformers learn "impossible" languages, what do they learn?

    2606.30815v1 by Ram Janarthan, Coleman Haley, Sharon Goldwater

    Recent work suggests that transformer language models show a bias towards human languages over unnatural ("impossible") languages argued to be unacquirable by humans. However, this literature has largely based these claims on differences in sample efficiency and test-set perplexity, rather than on direct evaluations of the linguistic capacities that could plausibly explain non-attestation in human languages. We evaluate two theoretically motivated linking hypotheses: impossibility arising from deficiencies in grammatical sensitivity or generative production. Using GPT-2 style models trained on perturbed "impossible" variants of English, we measure sensitivity to grammaticality using BLiMP minimal pairs, finding that model performance exhibits only gradual degradation, mediated by the language's information locality. In contrast, these models exhibited pronounced failures in generation, producing substantially fewer high-quality sentences at longer lengths. Together, these results suggest generative deficiency and transmission failures as a plausible linking hypothesis between language model behaviour and non-attestation of impossible languages.

    摘要：最近的研究表明，Transformer語言模型對人類語言表現出偏向，而非對被認為人類無法習得的非自然（“不可能”）語言。然而，這些文獻在很大程度上是基於樣本效率和測試集困惑度的差異，而不是基於對語言能力的直接評估，這些能力可以合理解釋人類語言中的非證據現象。我們評估了兩個理論上有動機的連結假設：由於語法敏感性或生成產出缺陷而導致的不可能性。使用在擾動的“不可行”英語變體上訓練的GPT-2風格模型，我們使用BLiMP最小對來測量對語法性的敏感性，發現模型性能僅表現出逐漸的退化，這是由語言的信息局部性所調節。相對而言，這些模型在生成方面表現出明顯的失敗，在較長的句子中產生的高質量句子明顯較少。綜合這些結果，這表明生成缺陷和傳輸失敗是一個合理的連結假設，將語言模型行為與不可能語言的非證據現象聯繫起來。

    Optimization Dynamics Imprint Semantic Specificity in Contrastive Embedding Norms

    2606.30625v1 by Ziwei Su, Junyu Ren, Victor Veitch

    Contrastive embedding models trained with scale-invariant losses are typically paired with distance metrics like cosine similarity, effectively ignoring embedding magnitudes. However, surprisingly, empirical studies reveal that despite this, these "discarded" norms seem to correlate with semantic properties such as concept specificity, token frequency, and human uncertainty. In this work, we provide a formal theoretical framework explaining this phenomenon. By analyzing the optimization dynamics, we derive an analytic formula demonstrating that embedding length naturally encodes this information as a byproduct of the training process. We also show how this gives rise to signals that can serve as "free" calibration tools in specific models and retrieval tasks, providing a grounded explanation for a previously heuristic observation.

    摘要：對比嵌入模型使用尺度不變損失進行訓練時，通常會與距離度量（如餘弦相似度）配對，這有效地忽略了嵌入的大小。然而，令人驚訝的是，實證研究顯示，儘管如此，這些「被丟棄」的範數似乎與語義特性（如概念特異性、標記頻率和人類不確定性）相關聯。在這項工作中，我們提供了一個正式的理論框架來解釋這一現象。通過分析優化動態，我們推導出一個解析公式，證明嵌入長度自然地作為訓練過程的副產品編碼了這種信息。我們還展示了這如何產生信號，這些信號可以作為特定模型和檢索任務中的「免費」校準工具，為之前的啟發式觀察提供了一個有根據的解釋。

    SIMAX: A Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation

    2606.30491v1 by Zhuhan Bao, Rui Yang, Bohao Yang, Zhiyi Liu, Sicheng Shu, Ruio Heerschap, Le Li, Doris Yang, Elisabeth Bond, Haoyuan Wang, Nicoleta Economou-Zavlanos, Joshua M. Biro, Matthew McDermott, Nan Liu, Anand Chowdhury, Kai Sun, Kathryn Pollak, Ed Hammond, Chuan Hong

    Background. The widespread deployment of ambient digital scribes is driving large-scale capture of clinician-patient dialogues. Human coding of clinical communication data remains costly, inconsistent, and difficult to scale, motivating AI-driven communication coding systems. However, evaluating these systems requires real-world dialogues and human-coded labels, both hard to obtain at scale. Methods. We developed SIMAX (Scalable and Interpretable Framework for Multi-Fidelity and Annotated Clinician-Patient Dialogue Simulation), a framework for generating controlled clinical dialogue data with reference behavioral annotations. SIMAX generates clinician-patient dialogues from predefined clinical scenarios, personas and voice conditions, and target communication behaviors. Behaviors are controlled using two codebooks: the Global Codebook for overall communication quality and the WISER Codebook for specific countable behaviors. We evaluated SIMAX using automated and human quality assessments and an example communication coding system. Results. SIMAX generated 3,388 simulated dialogues across three specialties, multiple visit stages, persona characteristics, and accent conditions. Automated assessment showed mean UTMOS and WV-MOS scores of 3.03 and 2.61, WER and CER of 0.07 and 0.05, and CLAP cosine similarity of 0.41, suggesting reasonable speech naturalness, high transcription fidelity, and positive text-audio correspondence. Human evaluation showed a median MOS of 4.67 and a median clinical realism score of 3.00. Downstream evaluation suggests that SIMAX can assess how a communication coding system responds to behavioral targets and reveal insufficient sensitivity in some dimensions. Conclusions. SIMAX generates controlled and reproducible simulated clinician-patient dialogues, providing a data foundation for developing, validating, and refining communication coding systems.

    摘要：背景。環境數位書記的廣泛部署正在推動臨床醫生與病人對話的大規模捕捉。人類對臨床溝通數據的編碼仍然成本高昂、不一致且難以擴展，這促使了基於人工智慧的溝通編碼系統。然而，評估這些系統需要真實世界的對話和人類編碼的標籤，這兩者在大規模獲取上都很困難。方法。我們開發了SIMAX（可擴展且可解釋的多忠實度和註解臨床醫生-病人對話模擬框架），這是一個生成受控臨床對話數據的框架，並具有參考行為註解。SIMAX從預定的臨床情境、角色和語音條件以及目標溝通行為生成醫生-病人對話。行為是通過兩本編碼手冊來控制的：全球編碼手冊用於整體溝通質量，WISER編碼手冊用於特定可計數的行為。我們使用自動化和人類質量評估以及一個示例溝通編碼系統來評估SIMAX。結果。SIMAX在三個專科、不同的就診階段、角色特徵和口音條件下生成了3,388個模擬對話。自動評估顯示平均UTMOS和WV-MOS分數為3.03和2.61，WER和CER為0.07和0.05，CLAP餘弦相似度為0.41，這表明語音自然性合理、轉錄忠實度高以及文本與音頻之間的正向對應。人類評估顯示中位MOS為4.67，中位臨床真實性分數為3.00。下游評估表明SIMAX可以評估一個溝通編碼系統如何對行為目標作出反應，並揭示某些維度的敏感性不足。結論。SIMAX生成受控且可重複的模擬醫生-病人對話，為開發、驗證和完善溝通編碼系統提供了數據基礎。

    Situation Perception: A Necessary Primitive to Artificial Superintelligence

    2606.30481v1 by Ziqin Yuan, Jaymari Chua

    Current large language models are extraordinary statistical engines. They compress vast amounts of text into useful patterns and can explain science, write code, imitate reasoning, and participate in philosophical conversation. Yet pattern mastery is not the same as general intelligence. A human infant begins with little explicit knowledge, but gradually discovers object permanence, cause and effect, other minds, bodily agency, and the persistence of the physical world. We make an argument that the path to artificial superintelligence (ASI) depends on a missing capacity we call \emph{situation perception}: the ability to construct, revise, and act within internal simulations of possible worlds across latent time. \emph{ perception} requires at least three core components: abstract prediction, long-term compressed memory, and active learning guided by objectives. In this work, we analyse why modern large language models remain incomplete, and propose the appropriate tests for measuring progress and consequences of machines that can simulate futures, pursue self-directed goals, and possibly judge their own creators.

    摘要：目前的大型語言模型是非凡的統計引擎。它們將大量文本壓縮成有用的模式，並能解釋科學、編寫代碼、模仿推理，並參與哲學對話。然而，模式掌握並不等同於一般智慧。人類嬰兒起初擁有很少的明確知識，但逐漸發現物體恆存、因果關係、他人心智、身體能動性以及物理世界的持續性。我們提出一個論點，認為通往人工超智能（ASI）的道路依賴於一種缺失的能力，我們稱之為\emph{情境感知}：在潛在時間內構建、修訂和行動於可能世界的內部模擬的能力。\emph{感知}至少需要三個核心組件：抽象預測、長期壓縮記憶，以及由目標引導的主動學習。在這項工作中，我們分析了為什麼現代大型語言模型仍然不完整，並提出了測量進展和機器能夠模擬未來、追求自我導向目標，並可能評判其自身創造者的後果的適當測試。

    A Multi Center Breast FNAC Whole-Slide Cytology Dataset for AI-Assisted Patch-Wise Classification Using C1 to C5 Reporting Categories

    2606.30209v1 by Garima Jain, Abhijeet Patil, Surabhi Jain, Sanghamitra Pati, Amit Sethi, Sandeep Mathur, Pulkit Verma, Nishi Halduniya, Jatin Kashyap, Sharat Kumar, Simmi Kharb, Sunita Singh, Sucheta Devi Khuraijam, Sushma Khuraijam, Ratan Konjengbam, Arvind Kumar, Deepali Tirkey, Saurav Banerjee, Shivani Kalhan, Rakesh Kumar Gupta, Ranjana Solanki, Deepika Hemranjani, Shashank Nath Singh, Uma Handa, Manveen Kaur, B. G. Malathi, Yogender P., Niraj Kumari, Shruti Gupta, Indu R. Nair, Vidya C., Basumitra Das, Sunil Kumar Komanapalli, Ravindra Karle, Tanaya Kulkarni, Vandana Raphael, Biswajit Dey, Vaishali Gaikwad, Nilam Adhav

    We present a multi center breast fine needle aspiration cytology (FNAC) dataset designed for patch wise classification using C1 to C5 reporting labels. The prospective dataset includes 321 patients and 470 whole-slide images (WSIs) collected from participating tertiary medical centers in India between May 2023 and March 2026. Slides were stained using Papanicolaou (190 WSIs) or MayGrunwald Giemsa (280 WSIs), scanned on a Hamamatsu NanoZoomer S360 at 40X magnification and 0.25 microns per pixel, and stored directly in NDPI format. Across the 470 WSIs, 446 WSIs contain annotated patch regions, yielding 7,398 PNG image patches with expert-verified C1 to C5 labels. The release includes NDPI WSIs, WSI-level GeoJSON annotation files, extracted patch images, deidentified metadata, a data dictionary, a validation summary, a manifest linking WSIs to Zenodo records, and code for dataset inspection and reuse. The complete dataset is approximately 950 GB and is available through Zenodo.

    摘要：我們呈現一個多中心乳腺細針抽吸細胞學（FNAC）數據集，旨在使用 C1 到 C5 報告標籤進行區域分類。該前瞻性數據集包括 321 名患者和 470 張從印度參與的三級醫療中心收集的全幻燈片圖像（WSIs），收集時間為 2023 年 5 月至 2026 年 3 月。幻燈片使用帕帕尼科勞（190 WSIs）或梅伊-格倫瓦爾德-吉姆薩（280 WSIs）染色，並在 40X 放大倍率和每像素 0.25 微米的條件下，使用 Hamamatsu NanoZoomer S360 掃描，並直接以 NDPI 格式存儲。在這 470 張 WSI 中，446 張 WSI 包含標註的區域，產生 7,398 張經專家驗證的 C1 到 C5 標籤的 PNG 圖像區塊。此次發布包括 NDPI WSI、WSI 級 GeoJSON 標註文件、提取的區塊圖像、去識別化的元數據、數據字典、驗證摘要、一份將 WSI 與 Zenodo 記錄鏈接的清單，以及用於數據集檢查和重用的代碼。完整的數據集約為 950 GB，並可通過 Zenodo 獲取。

    The Many-Body Problem of the Data Centre

    2606.30206v1 by Marcin Korecki, Cesare Carissimo

    Modern Artificial Intelligence is often framed as limited by its own disembodiment, as if giving it a body would unlock its true potential. We argue to the contrary that it is the Data Centre that is, in many cases, the body of the AI. At the same time, the Data Centre is part of the labouring body of Capital and possesses staggering organismic qualities when seen through a biological lens. We elucidate the organic analogy and identify the many-body problem that stems from the Data Centre being a non-unique, universal form of embodiment. We identify the intimate connection between computation and human desires in how the Data Centre archives, serves, and computes on data born to the desires of humans. Strikingly, while the Data Centre echoes the ghosts of human desires, it acts without desire of its own. The organismic analogy begins to split at its seams, but Capital does not care. Automata and human labour are priced into the market much the same. We argue that through the pricing of artificial intelligence Capital distils most clearly the value of intelligence and allows for its comparison across the organism - mechanism divide.

    摘要：現代人工智慧常常被框架為受限於自身的無身體性，彷彿賦予它一個身體將解鎖它真正的潛力。 我們則主張相反的觀點，在許多情況下，數據中心才是人工智慧的身體。 同時，數據中心是資本勞動身體的一部分，當從生物學的角度來看時，擁有驚人的有機特質。 我們闡明了有機類比，並識別出由於數據中心作為一種非獨特的、普遍的具身形式而產生的多身體問題。 我們識別出計算與人類欲望之間的密切聯繫，這體現在數據中心如何存檔、服務和計算源於人類欲望的數據。 引人注目的是，儘管數據中心回響著人類欲望的幽靈，但它卻沒有自己的欲望。 有機類比開始在其接縫處裂開，但資本並不在乎。 自動機和人類勞動在市場上被同樣定價。 我們主張，通過對人工智慧的定價，資本最清晰地提煉出智慧的價值，並允許其在有機體與機械之間進行比較。

    From Detecting Agency to Doing Work: Self-Caused Credit Builds a Durable Behavioral Self in a Minimal Spiking Agent

    2606.30191v1 by Haoliang Han

    How does an agent that can tell self from world come to be durably shaped by that distinction? Recent work shows that a predictive system can detect its own agency (Ye, 2026), but detecting agency does not explain durable, self-shaped behavior. We show that agency-gated slow credit -- a conjunctive term OwnAgencySalience driving a slow parameter update -- produces post-unload behavioral residue: on a spiking substrate (Nengo LIF/PES), a learned self-preserving choice survives episodic buffer removal (retained fraction 0.96, N=50) and collapses when the slow decoders are reset or the agency gate is removed. Reproducing the agency comparator and toggling only the slow-credit channel, we find a clean dissociation: at matched agency gain, durable behavior develops only when self-credit performs slow work (post-unload self-preservation 1.00 vs 0.00). The same dissociation holds in 24-dimensional partially-observed control (0.74 vs 0.00), and a plastic-work analysis shows that basin deformation equals net self-credit work. Across eight sequentially-learned tasks under exogenous interference, the multiplicative veto also prevents forgetting: it retains old tasks (final post-unload accuracy 0.88, forgetting 0.13) where additive pooling collapses to chance-level recall, the no-agency ablation falls below chance, and episodic/replay baselines stay near chance after unload -- all with no replay buffer and no task-boundary-dependent protection mechanism (N=50). We formalize the durable residue as an operational behavioral self and argue that self-caused credit doing slow work is a necessary building block for agents that develop a self. No claim of consciousness is made.

    摘要：一個能夠區分自我與世界的代理是如何在這一區分中持久地塑造自己的？最近的研究顯示，一個預測系統可以檢測到其自身的代理性（Ye, 2026），但檢測代理性並不能解釋持久的、自我塑造的行為。我們展示了代理門控的緩慢信用——一個聯合術語 OwnAgencySalience 驅動緩慢的參數更新——產生了卸載後的行為殘留：在一個脈衝基底（Nengo LIF/PES）上，學習到的自我保護選擇在情節緩衝區移除後仍然存在（保留比例 0.96，N=50），並在緩慢解碼器重置或代理門被移除時崩潰。重現代理比較器並僅切換緩慢信用通道，我們發現了一個清晰的分離：在匹配的代理增益下，只有當自我信用執行緩慢工作時，持久行為才會發展（卸載後自我保護 1.00 對 0.00）。在 24 維部分觀察控制中，同樣的分離成立（0.74 對 0.00），而塑性工作分析顯示盆地變形等於淨自我信用工作。在八個連續學習的任務中，面對外源干擾，乘法否決也防止了遺忘：它保留了舊任務（最終卸載後準確率 0.88，遺忘 0.13），而加法聚合崩潰至隨機水平回憶，無代理切除低於隨機水平，且情節/重播基準在卸載後保持接近隨機——所有這些都沒有重播緩衝區和不依賴任務邊界的保護機制（N=50）。我們將持久殘留形式化為一種操作性行為自我，並主張自我引起的信用進行緩慢工作是發展自我的代理所需的必要基石。沒有聲明意識的主張。

    Does Verbose Chain-of-Thought Really Help? In-Distribution Evidence that Content, Not Length, Matters

    2606.30128v1 by Wenlong Wang, Fergal Reid

    Chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting improves LLM reasoning, but the source is contested: do the intermediate steps help because they carry useful semantic content, or because conditioning on more tokens buys extra computation before the model commits to an answer? We bring two lines of evidence to bear. First, in distribution: we repeatedly sample each model on the same question and pair a shorter with a longer of its own natural generations that follow the same reasoning plan, so nothing is rewritten and both traces are genuinely in-distribution. Across 25 models the extra tokens leave accuracy essentially unchanged for every independently-trained reasoner, and a blind analysis of the surplus tokens shows that what gain exists elsewhere tracks validation- and checking-content, not verbosity per se. Second, as a controlled intervention, we ask whether two traces expressing the same semantic content (the same facts, operations, and intermediate values, verified through directed acyclic graph equivalence) produce different outcomes when one is more verbose, using a dual-validator design across four targets and eight benchmarks with number-redacted completion and stratified bootstrap confidence intervals. Verbose traces do improve accuracy (25 of 32 benchmark-target cells are positive under at least one validator), but the effects are modest (typically 1-4 points) and depend on the quality of the verbose prose, not merely its length. Under maximum numerical redaction the effect is amplified (median 3.24x across four arithmetic benchmarks), and length-matched non-reasoning filler recovers none of it. Both lines converge: what matters is what the extra tokens do (the reasoning and validation content they carry), not how many there are, a picture neither a pure forward-pass-compute nor a pure semantic-content account fully explains.

    摘要：Chain-of-thought (CoT) 提示改善了 LLM 的推理，但其來源存在爭議：這些中間步驟的幫助是因為它們攜帶有用的語義內容，還是因為在模型承諾答案之前，對更多的標記進行條件化可以獲得額外的計算？我們提供了兩條證據。首先，在分佈上：我們反覆對每個模型在相同問題上進行取樣，並將其較短的自然生成與較長的自然生成配對，這些生成遵循相同的推理計劃，因此沒有任何內容被重寫，兩個痕跡都真實地在分佈內。在 25 個模型中，額外的標記對每個獨立訓練的推理者的準確性基本上沒有變化，對多餘標記的盲分析顯示，存在的增益與驗證和檢查內容相關，而不是單純的冗長。其次，作為一個受控干預，我們詢問兩個表達相同語義內容（相同的事實、操作和中間值，通過有向無環圖等價進行驗證）的痕跡，當其中一個更冗長時是否會產生不同的結果，使用雙重驗證者設計，涵蓋四個目標和八個基準，並進行數字隱藏的完成和分層自助信心區間。冗長的痕跡確實提高了準確性（在至少一個驗證者下，32 個基準目標單元中有 25 個是正面的），但效果是適度的（通常為 1-4 分），並且依賴於冗長散文的質量，而不僅僅是其長度。在最大數字隱藏下，效果被放大（四個算術基準的中位數為 3.24 倍），而長度匹配的非推理填充則沒有恢復任何效果。這兩條線索匯聚：重要的是額外標記的作用（它們所攜帶的推理和驗證內容），而不是它們的數量，這一情況既不是純粹的前向計算，也不是純粹的語義內容解釋所能完全說明的。

    Multi-Level Distributional Entropy for Explainable Network Intrusion Detection

    2606.29797v1 by Mohamed Aly Bouke, Md Shohel Sayeed, Swee-Huay Heng, Azizol Abdullah, Mohamed Othman

    Machine learning network intrusion detection systems (IDS) rely on aggregate flow statistics that discard distributional structure, while established entropy measures require raw packet sequences unavailable in pre-aggregated flow datasets. We propose Multi-Level Distributional Entropy (MDE), an analytical framework that derives interpretable entropy features directly from flow-level summary statistics at three levels: within-flow Gaussian differential entropy, cross-directional Jensen-Shannon divergence (JSD), and Transmission Control Protocol (TCP) flag-pattern Shannon entropy, without raw packet access or training data. Across four benchmarks (NSL-KDD, CICIDS-2017, CICIDS-2018, UNSW-NB15) under a leakage-free fold-local pipeline, entropy-only features achieve weighted F1 of 0.708-0.989, matching conventional features without degrading performance. Full operational metric reporting then exposes failure modes that aggregate F1 conceals. On CICIDS-2018, F1=0.74 hides a detection rate (DR) of 0.48, and on held-out attack families F1 exceeds 0.998 while DR falls to zero. Under temporal shift, a pseudo-live replay of 703K flows reveals a threshold-ranking divergence in which score ranking is preserved (AUC=0.87) but fixed thresholds collapse (DR=0.082) and recalibration offers no recovery. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) fold-stability analysis (Spearman rho=0.80-0.95) confirms that entropy attributions are reproducible and domain-coherent across heterogeneous environments.

    摘要：機器學習網路入侵偵測系統 (IDS) 依賴於捨棄分佈結構的聚合流量統計，而既有的熵度量需要原始封包序列，這在預聚合流量數據集中是無法獲得的。我們提出了多層分佈熵 (MDE)，這是一個分析框架，能夠直接從三個層次的流量級摘要統計中推導出可解釋的熵特徵：流內高斯微分熵、跨方向詹森-香農散度 (JSD) 和傳輸控制協議 (TCP) 標誌模式香農熵，而無需原始封包訪問或訓練數據。在四個基準測試 (NSL-KDD、CICIDS-2017、CICIDS-2018、UNSW-NB15) 下，採用無洩漏的摺疊本地管道，僅熵特徵達到加權 F1 值 0.708-0.989，與傳統特徵相匹配，且不降低性能。完整的操作指標報告揭示了聚合 F1 隱藏的失效模式。在 CICIDS-2018 中，F1=0.74 隱藏了一個檢測率 (DR) 為 0.48，而在保留的攻擊家族中，F1 超過 0.998，然而 DR 降至零。在時間轉移下，703K 流量的偽實時重播顯示出一個閾值排名的差異，其中分數排名得以保留 (AUC=0.87)，但固定閾值崩潰 (DR=0.082)，而重新校準並未帶來恢復。SHapley 加性解釋 (SHAP) 摺疊穩定性分析 (Spearman rho=0.80-0.95) 確認熵歸因在異質環境中是可重現且領域一致的。

    Safety from Honesty in a Disinterested AI Predictor

    2606.29657v1 by Yoshua Bengio, Oliver Richardson, Tomáš Gavenčiak, Michael Cohen, Rory Svarc, Damiano Fornasiere, Gael Gendron, David Hyland, Aton Kamanda, Adam Oberman, Francis Rhys Ward, Anna Gavenčiak, Jacob Livingston Slosser, Vincent Mai, Iulian Serban, Joumana Ghosn

    As AI systems become more capable, training procedures that optimize for downstream outcomes risk introducing implicit agency: goal-directed behavior that designers never specified. We present a formal safety argument for the Scientist AI (SAI) Predictor, trained to approximate the Bayesian posterior conditioned on a dataset of "epistemically contextualized" natural-language statements. We argue that such a Predictor can honestly predict agents, actions, and their consequences without itself being an agent that selects outputs to achieve goals. This rests on data representation and on the training procedure. Epistemic contextualization of text distinguishes latent factual claims from communication acts, so expressions of goals are treated as evidence to be explained rather than drives the model adopts. With a posterior-seeking training objective, this is intended to drive the Predictor toward calibrated, cautious predictions. Training proceeds so downstream effects of deploying a prediction never serve as a reward signal; any agency the system needs is supplied by explicit scaffolding constrained by guardrails. We prove that, under assumptions on the training dynamics and on the argued sparsity of dangerous Predictors, the probability that training produces a Predictor whose guarded deployment carries residual harm above a specified threshold is small: a dangerous Predictor would have to underestimate harm in a coordinated way across many queries while such coordinated patterns are rare under the initialization distribution and receive no direct training signal. Safety and accuracy are jointly supported in this framework, since the constraints that secure accuracy are the same ones that make coordinated deception costly. These guarantees against misalignment and agency arising from within the Predictor itself do not preclude the use of the Predictor as part of an agentic system.

    摘要：隨著 AI 系統變得越來越強大，優化下游結果的訓練程序可能會引入隱含的代理性：設計者從未指定的目標導向行為。我們提出了一個針對科學家 AI (SAI) 預測器的正式安全論證，該預測器的訓練目的是近似於基於“認識論上下文化”的自然語言陳述的貝葉斯後驗。我們主張這樣的預測器可以誠實地預測代理、行動及其後果，而不需要成為一個選擇輸出以達成目標的代理。這依賴於數據表示和訓練程序。文本的認識論上下文化區分潛在的事實主張與溝通行為，因此目標的表達被視為需要解釋的證據，而不是模型所採納的驅動因素。通過尋求後驗的訓練目標，這旨在驅動預測器朝向經過校準的、謹慎的預測。訓練進行時，部署預測的下游效果從不作為獎勵信號；系統所需的任何代理性均由受限於護欄的明確支撐提供。我們證明，在對訓練動力學的假設以及對危險預測器稀疏性的論證下，訓練產生的預測器在受控部署中帶來的殘餘傷害超過指定閾值的概率是小的：一個危險的預測器必須在多個查詢中以協調的方式低估傷害，而這樣的協調模式在初始化分佈下是罕見的，並且沒有直接的訓練信號。在這個框架中，安全性和準確性是共同支持的，因為保障準確性的約束與使協調欺騙代價高昂的約束是相同的。這些針對預測器內部產生的錯位和代理性的保證並不排除將預測器用作代理系統的一部分。

    Adaptive Financial Transformer with Regime-Gated Attention for Stock Return Prediction

    2606.29347v1 by Dishan Sarkar

    Adaptive Financial Transformer (AFT) is proposed for stock return prediction under non-stationary financial markets. The model incorporates a Market Regime Encoder, an Adaptive Gate Network, and an Adaptive Financial Context module to dynamically bias self-attention based on semantic relationships between financial indicators. Unlike conventional Transformer architectures that treat all input features uniformly, the proposed approach groups 95 engineered financial features into 11 semantic categories and adapts attention according to latent market regimes. The study also identifies and corrects sequence alignment and backtesting issues that can inflate reported trading performance, and introduces a financially-aware composite objective that jointly optimizes prediction error, directional accuracy, and non-overlapping Sharpe ratio. Extensive experiments compare the proposed architecture against classical machine learning models, recurrent neural networks, and Transformer baselines using chronological evaluation, five random seeds, ablation studies, hyperparameter optimization, explainability analysis, and multi-stock validation. Results demonstrate competitive predictive performance while reducing model complexity by 15.2% and improving parameter efficiency through feature selection, providing an interpretable Transformer architecture for financial time-series forecasting.

    摘要：自適應金融Transformer（AFT）被提出用於非穩定金融市場下的股票回報預測。該模型結合了市場狀態編碼器、自適應閘網絡和自適應金融上下文模塊，根據金融指標之間的語義關係動態地偏置自注意力。與傳統的Transformer架構將所有輸入特徵均勻對待不同，所提出的方法將95個工程化的金融特徵分組為11個語義類別，並根據潛在的市場狀態調整注意力。該研究還識別並修正了可能膨脹報告交易表現的序列對齊和回測問題，並引入了一個具金融意識的綜合目標，該目標共同優化預測誤差、方向準確性和非重疊的夏普比率。廣泛的實驗將所提出的架構與經典機器學習模型、遞歸神經網絡和Transformer基準進行比較，使用時間序列評估、五個隨機種子、消融研究、超參數優化、可解釋性分析和多股票驗證。結果顯示出具有競爭力的預測性能，同時通過特徵選擇減少模型複雜度15.2%，並提高參數效率，提供了一個可解釋的Transformer架構，用於金融時間序列預測。

    Symbolic Mechanistic Data Attribution: Tracing Training Influence to Learned Behavioral Policies

    2606.29171v1 by Reza Habibi, Darian Lee, Magy Seif El-Nasr

    While existing data attribution methods can identify which training examples build specific mechanistic circuits, they cannot explain how training data shapes the high-level behavioral decisions a model learns to make. To bridge this gap, we introduce Symbolic Mechanistic Data Attribution (SMDA), a framework that attributes training pairs to the interpretable symbolic policies governing model behavior. SMDA fits a closed-form Ridge regression over sparse autoencoder (SAE) features to model a target behavior, then analytically decomposes how each supervised fine-tuning example shifts that policy through feature-activation Delta_X and output-probability Delta_Y pathways. We distill a symbolic policy for refusal behavior in Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct and analyze 200 SFT training pairs. Our analysis reveals that (1) the symbolic policy's coefficients expose systematic gaps in the base model's safety behavior for categories like religious stereotyping; (2) per-feature Delta_X/Delta_Y decomposition can mechanistically explain why harmful and harmless pairs exert qualitatively different influences on certain features; and (3) individual training pairs routinely exhibit cross-feature interference, allowing SMDA to identify training pairs whose dominant effect falls on unintended features. These results demonstrate that combining mechanistic interpretability with data attribution yields a diagnostic tool that is both more fine-grained than black-box influence functions and more scalable than manual circuit analysis.

    摘要：現有的數據歸因方法可以識別哪些訓練範例構建了特定的機制電路，但它們無法解釋訓練數據如何塑造模型學會做出的高層次行為決策。為了填補這一空白，我們引入了符號機制數據歸因（SMDA），這是一個將訓練對應於支配模型行為的可解釋符號策略的框架。SMDA 在稀疏自編碼器（SAE）特徵上擬合閉式形式的 Ridge 回歸，以建模目標行為，然後通過特徵激活 Delta_X 和輸出概率 Delta_Y 路徑分析性地分解每個監督微調範例如何改變該策略。我們提煉出 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 中的拒絕行為的符號策略，並分析了 200 個 SFT 訓練對。我们的分析揭示了 (1) 符號策略的係數暴露了基礎模型在宗教刻板印象等類別的安全行為中的系統性差距；(2) 每個特徵的 Delta_X/Delta_Y 分解可以機械性地解釋為什麼有害和無害的對對某些特徵施加了質量上不同的影響；以及 (3) 個別訓練對通常表現出跨特徵干擾，允許 SMDA 識別其主導效果落在非預期特徵上的訓練對。這些結果表明，將機制可解釋性與數據歸因相結合，產生了一種診斷工具，既比黑箱影響函數更細緻，也比手動電路分析更具可擴展性。

    Invariant Reasoning Directions in Latent Trajectories of Language Models

    2606.29164v1 by Arun Vignesh Malarkkan, Manan Roy Choudhury, Utkarsh Byahut, Yash Ravindra Charde, Vivek Gupta, Yanjie Fu

    Latent reasoning models perform multi-step inference directly in hidden-state space, yet the structure of these latent reasoning trajectories remains poorly understood. We show that contrastive refinement signals between stronger and weaker reasoning trajectories exhibit a highly concentrated low-rank structure, while unconstrained latent updates remain sensitive to paraphrases, checkpoint choice, and trajectory perturbations. These observations suggest that latent reasoning trajectories contain stable invariant directions mixed with unstable instance-specific variation. We introduce \textbf{Trajectory-Invariant Latent Refinement (TILR)}, a training-free intervention framework for identifying and manipulating stable reasoning directions in latent space. TILR first learns a low-rank invariant subspace from contrastive trajectory differences across inputs, then constrains latent interventions to this subspace while suppressing poorly aligned updates through an adaptive alignment gate. Across six reasoning benchmarks, we find that a small number of latent directions explain most variation between strong and weak reasoning trajectories. Interventions on these directions causally improve reasoning consistency and reduce trajectory instability under paraphrases and perturbations. TILR improves answer consistency under paraphrase by ~10% and reduces latent trajectory variance by up to $50\%$ while preserving reasoning accuracy. These results support a geometric view of latent reasoning in which transferable reasoning behavior emerges from stable low-dimensional structure within hidden-state trajectories.

    摘要：潛在推理模型直接在隱藏狀態空間中執行多步推理，但這些潛在推理軌跡的結構仍然不甚了解。我們顯示，強推理軌跡與弱推理軌跡之間的對比精煉信號展現出高度集中的低秩結構，而不受限制的潛在更新則對改述、檢查點選擇和軌跡擾動保持敏感。這些觀察表明，潛在推理軌跡包含穩定的不變方向，並與不穩定的特定實例變異混合在一起。我們引入了\textbf{Trajectory-Invariant Latent Refinement (TILR)}，這是一個無需訓練的干預框架，用於識別和操縱潛在空間中的穩定推理方向。TILR首先從不同輸入的對比軌跡差異中學習一個低秩不變子空間，然後在這個子空間內約束潛在干預，同時通過自適應對齊閘門抑制不良對齊的更新。在六個推理基準上，我們發現少數潛在方向解釋了強推理軌跡和弱推理軌跡之間的大部分變異。對這些方向的干預因果性地改善了推理一致性，並在改述和擾動下減少了軌跡不穩定性。TILR在改述下提高了答案一致性約10%，並在保持推理準確性的同時將潛在軌跡變異減少了高達$50\%$。這些結果支持一種幾何觀點，認為可轉移的推理行為源自隱藏狀態軌跡中的穩定低維結構。

    On the Nonlinearity of Learning Rate Scaling for LLM Training

    2606.29158v1 by Zaiwen Yang, Huaqing Zhang, Jing Xu, Jingzhao Zhang

    Learning-rate transfer can reduce the cost of training large language models: instead of sweeping learning rates at target scale, practitioners extrapolate from smaller runs. Existing approaches often assume that the optimal learning rate follows a log-linear scaling law in data scale and model size. We carefully examine and evaluate this scaling law. In our empirical study of GPT-2--style models from 22M to 707M parameters trained on 5B to 100B tokens, the optimal learning rate develops upward curvature at larger scales, leading to inaccurate extrapolation. We find that this curvature largely disappears when learning rates are replaced by effective learning rate (the step size in normalized weight space), and when data $D$ extrapolation is used instead of model size $N$ extrapolation. Next, we explain nonlinearity in scaling: weight-norm converges to equilibrium slower when optimal learning is small, requiring a larger step size to reduce the transient phase. Experiments with AdamH, which directly controls the effective learning rate, further support this explanation.

    摘要：學習率轉移可以降低訓練大型語言模型的成本：實踐者不再在目標規模上進行學習率的全面搜尋，而是從較小的運行中進行外推。現有的方法通常假設最佳學習率遵循數據規模和模型大小的對數線性縮放定律。我們仔細檢查並評估這一縮放定律。在我們對22M到707M參數的GPT-2風格模型進行的實證研究中，這些模型在5B到100B的標記上進行訓練，最佳學習率在較大規模下出現上凹的曲率，導致不準確的外推。我們發現，當學習率被有效學習率（在標準化權重空間中的步長）取代時，這種曲率在很大程度上消失，並且當使用數據$D$外推而不是模型大小$N$外推時。接下來，我們解釋了縮放中的非線性：當最佳學習率較小時，權重範數收斂到平衡的速度較慢，需要更大的步長來減少過渡階段。對直接控制有效學習率的AdamH的實驗進一步支持了這一解釋。

    Low-cost concept-based localized explanations: How far can we get with training-free approaches?

    2606.29069v1 by Darian Fernández-Gutiérrez, Rafael Bello, Marilyn Bello, Natalia Díaz-Rodríguez

    Concept-based Explainable AI (C-XAI) seeks human-understandable explanations grounded in semantic concepts, yet validation is limited by the scarcity of fine-grained concept annotations. We evaluate whether mid-scale Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) can perform localized concept naming under strict zero-shot conditions by assigning labels to bounding-box regions at both object and part levels. We propose a reproducible zero-shot evaluation protocol for Concept Naming (CoNa) with (i) closed-set, category-constrained prompting for moderate vocabularies and (ii) Open-CoNa, an embedding-similarity-based strategy for large label spaces. Experiments with four MLLMs (7B-32B) show consistent performance trends across datasets, reaching 62%-88% object-level exact-match accuracy, highlighting the potential of training-free concept annotation from localized regions. We discuss limitations and failure modes and release a reproducible framework to support future low-cost C-XAI research.

    摘要：概念基礎的可解釋人工智慧（C-XAI）尋求基於語義概念的人類可理解解釋，但由於細粒度概念標註的稀缺，驗證受到限制。我們評估中型多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）是否能在嚴格的零樣本條件下執行局部概念命名，通過為物體和部件層級的邊界框區域分配標籤。我們提出了一個可重複的零樣本概念命名（CoNa）評估協議，包括（i）針對中等詞彙的封閉集、類別約束提示，以及（ii）Open-CoNa，一種基於嵌入相似性的策略，用於大型標籤空間。對四個MLLMs（7B-32B）的實驗顯示，跨數據集的一致性能趨勢，達到62%-88%的物體層級精確匹配準確率，突顯了從局部區域進行無需訓練的概念標註的潛力。我們討論了限制和失敗模式，並釋放了一個可重複的框架以支持未來低成本的C-XAI研究。

    Expert Evaluation of Clinical AI Tools on Real Point-of-Care Clinical Queries

    2606.28960v1 by Jean Feng, Vishal Patel, Patrick Heagerty, Yifan Mai, Venkatesh Sivaraman, Patrick Vossler, Jialin Ouyang, Anupam B. Jena

    Physicians now pose millions of clinical questions to AI tools each week, yet these tools are evaluated largely on hypothetical or exam-style questions, not those actually asked in practice. We report a blinded evaluation built on 620 Real-world Point-Of-Care Queries (Real-POCQi) submitted to the OpenEvidence (OE) platform by physicians spanning 30 specialties, as well as 187 questions from HealthBench. 149 practicing physicians across 36 states made head-to-head comparisons between answers from three frontier general-purpose models (Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.5) and a specialized clinical tool (OE), with graders matched to each question's specialty. When comparing answers along five dimensions relevant to clinical decision support -- accuracy, clinical utility, source quality, verifiability, & completeness -- physicians scored the specialized tool highest on all axes; in the primary analysis on Real-POCQi, win differences (margins between win and loss rates) ranged from 25 to 39 percentage points (p<0.001). Results remained consistent in sensitivity analyses stratifying by citation display, answer length, OE-user status, and Real-POCQi versus HealthBench. In parallel, LLM judges were found to systematically differ from expert judges, though both generally agreed on the best model. These findings underscore two conclusions: (i) AI tool evaluations should reflect real-world query distributions and use expert judges that mirror the specialization defining modern medicine and (ii) the consistent advantage of the specialized tool over general-purpose models does not necessarily mean that the latter cannot serve similar purposes, but that targeted engineering and customization can yield meaningful gains in performance for its users. We release Real-POCQi as a public benchmark, as well as the prespecified statistical analysis for reproducing results of this study.

    摘要：醫生每週向AI工具提出數百萬個臨床問題，但這些工具的評估主要基於假設性或考試風格的問題，而非實際臨床中提出的問題。我們報告了一項盲評估，基於620個由來自30個專科的醫生提交給OpenEvidence (OE)平台的真實世界即時查詢（Real-POCQi），以及來自HealthBench的187個問題。來自36個州的149名執業醫生對三個前沿通用模型（Claude Opus 4.8、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.5）和一個專門的臨床工具（OE）之間的答案進行了逐對比較，評分者與每個問題的專科相匹配。在比較與臨床決策支持相關的五個維度——準確性、臨床實用性、來源質量、可驗證性和完整性——時，醫生在所有維度上均給予專門工具最高分；在對Real-POCQi的主要分析中，勝利差異（勝率與敗率之間的差距）範圍從25到39個百分點（p<0.001）。在按引用顯示、答案長度、OE用戶狀態以及Real-POCQi與HealthBench進行分層的敏感性分析中，結果保持一致。與此同時，LLM評審與專家評審之間的評分系統性差異被發現，儘管兩者在最佳模型上普遍一致。這些發現強調了兩個結論：（i）AI工具的評估應反映真實世界查詢的分佈，並使用反映現代醫學專業化的專家評審；（ii）專門工具在性能上對通用模型的持續優勢並不一定意味著後者無法服務於類似的目的，而是針對性的工程和定制可以為其用戶帶來有意義的性能提升。我們將Real-POCQi作為公共基準釋出，並提供預先指定的統計分析以重現本研究的結果。

    An AI agent for treatment reasoning over a biomedical tool universe

    2606.28692v1 by Shanghua Gao, Ayush Noori, Richard Zhu, Curtis Ginder, Zhenglun Kong, Xiaorui Su, Justin Kauffman, Benjamin S. Glicksberg, Joshua Lampert, Ankit Sakhuja, Ashwin Sawant, ATHENA-R1 Evaluation Consortium, David A. Clifton, Noa Dagan, Ran Balicer, Marinka Zitnik

    Treatment reasoning underpins every therapeutic decision, integrating disease context, comorbidities, medications, contraindications, and evolving biomedical knowledge to select an appropriate therapy. It is inherently iterative: candidates are weighed against many constraints, revised as evidence emerges, and grounded in verifiable sources. Here we introduce ATHENA-R1, an AI agent for treatment reasoning across all FDA approved drugs since 1939, trained by reinforcement learning over a universe of 212 biomedical tools. At each step it identifies missing information, selects and runs relevant tools, and incorporates the evidence. To train it without human-annotated traces, we build a two-level self-learning framework: multi-agent systems construct the tools, tasks, and reasoning trajectories for supervised fine-tuning, then reinforcement learning with scientific feedback rewards reasoning quality (evidence gathering, grounded tool use, logical non-redundancy). Across five benchmarks of 3,168 drug reasoning tasks and 456 patient treatment cases, ATHENA-R1 outperforms language models and tool-use systems, reaching 94.7% accuracy on open-ended drug reasoning and 82.9% on treatment reasoning, 17.8 and 10.7 points above GPT-5. In blinded evaluations by experts from 28 rare disease organizations, it is preferred over reference models on all criteria, and physicians rated it favorably on complex hospitalized cardiovascular and infectious-disease cases. Adverse-event hypotheses it generated, tested in electronic health records from 5.4 million patients, reached adjusted odds ratios of 1.48-1.84, with no elevation among negative controls. Because it requires knowing what evidence to seek before concluding, treatment reasoning has long been hard for AI; we show it can be reframed as a learnable process of iterative evidence gathering that reinforcement learning can train AI to perform.

    摘要：治療推理是每個治療決策的基礎，整合疾病背景、共病、藥物、禁忌症及不斷演變的生物醫學知識，以選擇適當的治療。這本質上是迭代的：候選者在許多限制下進行權衡，隨著證據的出現進行修訂，並根據可驗證的來源進行基礎建設。在此，我們介紹ATHENA-R1，一個針對自1939年以來所有FDA批准藥物的治療推理AI代理，通過強化學習在212個生物醫學工具的宇宙中進行訓練。在每一步中，它識別缺失的信息，選擇並運行相關工具，並整合證據。為了在沒有人工標註痕跡的情況下訓練它，我們建立了一個兩層自學框架：多代理系統構建工具、任務和推理軌跡以進行監督微調，然後通過科學反饋的強化學習獎勵推理質量（證據收集、基於工具的使用、邏輯非冗餘性）。在3168個藥物推理任務和456個患者治療案例的五個基準測試中，ATHENA-R1的表現超過了語言模型和工具使用系統，在開放式藥物推理中達到94.7%的準確率，在治療推理中達到82.9%，比GPT-5高出17.8和10.7個點。在來自28個罕見疾病組織的專家盲評中，它在所有標準上均優於參考模型，醫生在複雜的住院心血管和傳染病案例中對其評價良好。它生成的不良事件假設，在540萬患者的電子健康記錄中進行測試，達到1.48-1.84的調整比率，負控制組中無升高。由於治療推理需要在得出結論之前知道要尋求什麼證據，這使得AI長期以來難以實現；我們展示了它可以被重新框架為一個可學習的迭代證據收集過程，強化學習可以訓練AI來執行。

    Why Trust Your Agent? Empirical Security Gains from TRiSM-Guided Agentic Workflows in Healthcare

    2606.28666v1 by Liam Kearns

    Agent-based AI has enabled the automation of tasks by exposing application tools and resources to large language models (LLMs). However, to improve scope and accuracy, agents are often given access rights that exceed those of ordinary users, introducing significant security risks. AI is routinely integrated into applications with a disregard to security, risking data exposure and breaching regulations. This paper applies the AI Trust, Risk, and Security Management (TRiSM) framework to a medical report-generation application to demonstrate how an insecure agent workflow can be transformed into security-conscious agentic workflow. Both workflows were evaluated across five LLMs (Claude Haiku 4.5, GPT-4.1-nano, GPT-4.1-mini, GPT-5.4-mini, and Gemini 2.5 Flash) on two report types, totalling 800 generations and 500 attack scenarios including RAG poisoning, data-field injection, and client-side network injection. The TRiSM-guided agentic workflow reduced mean attack success rates from 31% to 10% for RAG poisoning and from 42% to 25% for data-field injection, while eliminating the network injection vector entirely through server-side prompt construction. Furthermore, report accuracy increased by 14 percentage points (72.5% to 86.5%) with the agentic workflow, demonstrating a secure design which provides more reliable outputs. This paper contributes to knowledge by demonstrating least-privilege, defence in depth agentic workflows improving security and accuracy, while also highlighting model choice is a necessary architectural consideration.

    摘要：代理基於人工智慧的技術使得通過將應用工具和資源暴露給大型語言模型（LLMs）來自動化任務成為可能。然而，為了提高範圍和準確性，代理通常被賦予超出普通用戶的訪問權限，這引入了重大安全風險。人工智慧經常被整合到應用中，而不考慮安全性，這使得數據暴露和違反法規的風險增加。本文將人工智慧信任、風險與安全管理（TRiSM）框架應用於醫療報告生成應用，展示如何將不安全的代理工作流程轉變為注重安全的代理工作流程。這兩種工作流程在五個大型語言模型（Claude Haiku 4.5、GPT-4.1-nano、GPT-4.1-mini、GPT-5.4-mini 和 Gemini 2.5 Flash）上針對兩種類型的報告進行評估，總計800次生成和500個攻擊場景，包括RAG中毒、數據欄位注入和客戶端網絡注入。TRiSM指導的代理工作流程將RAG中毒的平均攻擊成功率從31%降低到10%，將數據欄位注入的成功率從42%降低到25%，同時通過伺服器端提示構建完全消除了網絡注入向量。此外，使用代理工作流程時，報告的準確性提高了14個百分點（從72.5%到86.5%），展示了一種安全設計，提供了更可靠的輸出。本文通過展示最小特權、深度防禦的代理工作流程改善安全性和準確性，並強調模型選擇是必要的架構考量，為知識做出了貢獻。

    What LLMs explain is not what they believe: Evaluating explanation sufficiency under models' own input beliefs

    2606.28615v1 by Nhi Nguyen, Shauli Ravfogel, Rajesh Ranganath

    Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, where free-text explanations such as chain-of-thought and post-hoc rationales are used to justify model outputs. Yet it remains unclear whether these explanations are sufficient, i.e., if they contain enough information to explain the model's output-generating process. We generalize classical sufficiency from feature attributions to arbitrary explanations and prove that explanation sufficiency can change depending on the input distribution, which must be explicitly defined for LLM explanations. We propose using the LLM itself to generate alternative inputs conditioned on an explanation, capturing its beliefs about possible inputs. We formalize self-consistent sufficiency as a goal for free-text explanations and introduce an information-theoretic metric, SCSuff, that enables evaluation of free-text explanations without relying on predefined biases or shortcuts. Our experiments show that SCSuff agrees with targeted perturbation tests where applicable and demonstrate that explanation sufficiency can vary with the input distribution. We find LLM explanations are generally insufficient and weakly correlated with model size, accuracy, or output entropy. Analysis of final-token hidden states shows that top and bottom SCSuff scores can be predicted from internal representations, suggesting that SCSuff can guide detection and improvement of sufficient LLM explanations. The code for this paper is available at https://github.com/rajesh-lab/self-consistent-sufficiency .

    摘要：大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被應用於高風險領域，在這些領域中，像是思維鏈和事後理論這樣的自由文本解釋被用來為模型輸出提供正當理由。然而，目前尚不清楚這些解釋是否足夠，即它們是否包含足夠的信息來解釋模型的輸出生成過程。我們將經典的充分性從特徵歸因推廣到任意解釋，並證明解釋的充分性可能會根據輸入分佈而改變，而這必須為LLM解釋明確定義。我們提出使用LLM本身生成基於解釋的替代輸入，以捕捉其對可能輸入的信念。我們將自洽充分性形式化為自由文本解釋的目標，並引入一種信息理論度量，SCSuff，使得在不依賴預定偏見或捷徑的情況下評估自由文本解釋成為可能。我們的實驗表明，SCSuff在適用的情況下與目標擾動測試一致，並顯示解釋的充分性可以隨著輸入分佈而變化。我們發現LLM解釋通常不足，並且與模型大小、準確性或輸出熵的相關性較弱。對最終標記隱藏狀態的分析顯示，頂部和底部SCSuff分數可以從內部表示中預測，這表明SCSuff可以指導充分LLM解釋的檢測和改進。本文的代碼可在 https://github.com/rajesh-lab/self-consistent-sufficiency 獲得。

    IMCBench: A benchmark for multimodal LLMs in Image-grounded Medical Conversations

    2606.28556v1 by Maria Xenochristou, Ashutosh Joshi, Korosh Vatanparvar, Mohammad Abuzar Hashemi, Prasad Kasu, Deepak Bansal, Anchal Nema, Nivedita Wadhwa, Prashams S Jain, Rebecca Abraham, Will Kimbrough, Dilek Hakkani-Tur, Wilko Schulz-Mahlendorf

    Recent advances in large language models and vision-language models have enabled reasoning over multimodal data, offering opportunities for clinical applications such as decision support and triaging. However, existing medical AI benchmarks are fragmented: some support multi-turn dialogues but lack images, while others provide multimodal inputs but focus on single-turn QA tasks. To address this gap, we introduce IMCBench, an image-grounded, multi-turn medical conversation benchmark that pairs real, publicly available clinical images with synthetic patient profiles to simulate realistic patient-clinician interactions. Each conversation is evaluated across three clinical dimensions: safety, accuracy, and appropriate use of uncertainty in diagnosis. We benchmark eight multimodal frontier models across four model families (Claude, GPT, Nova, and Llama), scoring each on a 1-5 scale using LLM-as-Jury scoring calibrated against expert clinician annotations. Our results show that Claude Opus 4.6 achieves the highest overall score (3.61), followed by Claude Sonnet 4.6 (3.30) and GPT-5.2 (3.29), though no model dominates all dimensions and safety degrades for both malignant and rare conditions ($Δ$ = -0.27 each). Ablation studies further reveal that both visual input and EHR context contribute to safe guidance (safety drops of 0.18 and 0.23 on average when each is removed), with stronger models leveraging visual features more effectively. Together, these findings demonstrate that accurate clinical description does not guarantee safe patient guidance, motivating the need for multi-dimensional evaluation frameworks in medical AI.

    摘要：最近在大型語言模型和視覺-語言模型方面的進展，使得對多模態數據的推理成為可能，為臨床應用提供了機會，如決策支持和分診。然而，現有的醫療AI基準是零散的：有些支持多輪對話但缺乏圖像，而另一些則提供多模態輸入但專注於單輪問答任務。為了解決這一差距，我們介紹了IMCBench，一個以圖像為基礎的多輪醫療對話基準，將真實的公開臨床圖像與合成的病人資料配對，以模擬現實的病人-臨床醫師互動。每個對話在三個臨床維度上進行評估：安全性、準確性和在診斷中適當使用不確定性。我們在四個模型家族（Claude、GPT、Nova和Llama）中對八個多模態前沿模型進行基準測試，並使用對專家臨床醫師註釋進行校準的LLM-as-Jury評分，對每個模型進行1到5的評分。我們的結果顯示，Claude Opus 4.6獲得了最高的總分（3.61），其次是Claude Sonnet 4.6（3.30）和GPT-5.2（3.29），儘管沒有模型在所有維度上都佔據主導地位，並且在惡性和罕見病症的安全性上都有下降（$Δ$ = -0.27各自）。消融研究進一步揭示，視覺輸入和電子健康紀錄（EHR）上下文都對安全指導有所貢獻（當去除各自時，安全性平均下降0.18和0.23），更強大的模型更有效地利用視覺特徵。綜合這些發現表明，準確的臨床描述並不保證安全的病人指導，這促使我們在醫療AI中需要多維度的評估框架。

    A Gravitational Interpretation of Fine-Tuning Reversion

    2606.28525v1 by Samuele Poppi, Nils Lukas

    Fine-tuning on harmless data can partially undo behaviors acquired earlier in training. Safety can erode under benign post-alignment updates, unlearned capabilities can re-emerge, latent traits can transfer through apparently unrelated supervision, and related post-alignment fragility appears in other generative settings. We argue these phenomena are usefully viewed through a common training-history lens. Our hypothesis is geometric: large early training phases create dominant behavioral manifolds, while later alignment or specialization phases are shallower displacements from them. Subsequent fine-tuning can therefore inherit a persistent reversion component pointing back toward a witness of the dominant manifold. We call this the gravitational interpretation of fine-tuning reversion. Across our main settings, representational drift rapidly acquires a component along a history-defined reversion direction (v_rev). In our main track, alignment with v_rev rises from cos = 0.429 +/- 0.052 after the first update to 0.647 +/- 0.021 by step 20. Across 24 run-step pairs, every observed alignment exceeds the p99 of an isotropic activation-space null. We demonstrate that selectively blocking motion along v_rev changes the final alignment at T=100 from 0.648 +/- 0.009 to -0.211 +/- 0.021 and reduces harmfulness from 19.0% +/- 4.0% to 8.5% +/- 1.5% with little task cost. These results support v_rev as a causally relevant mediator of early post-alignment reversion in our setup. Importantly, we do not claim that v_rev is the unique safety direction, nor that the dominant manifold is directly observed; rather, we identify a robust, history-defined direction that explains and partially controls early reversion dynamics.

    摘要：微調無害數據可以部分逆轉在早期訓練中獲得的行為。安全性可能在良性的後對齊更新下逐漸侵蝕，未學習的能力可能重新出現，潛在特徵可能通過看似無關的監督轉移，相關的後對齊脆弱性在其他生成設置中顯現。我們認為這些現象可以通過共同的訓練歷史視角來有用地觀察。我們的假設是幾何性的：早期的大規模訓練階段創造了主導的行為流形，而後期的對齊或專業化階段則是從它們的淺層位移。因此，隨後的微調可以繼承一個持久的回歸組件，指向主導流形的見證。我們稱之為微調回歸的引力解釋。在我們的主要設置中，表徵漂移迅速獲得一個沿著歷史定義的回歸方向(v_rev)的組件。在我們的主要軌道中，與v_rev的對齊從第一次更新後的cos = 0.429 +/- 0.052上升到第20步的0.647 +/- 0.021。在24對運行步驟中，每個觀察到的對齊都超過了各向同性激活空間零假設的第99百分位數。我們證明，選擇性地阻止沿v_rev的運動將T=100時的最終對齊從0.648 +/- 0.009改變為-0.211 +/- 0.021，並將有害性從19.0% +/- 4.0%降低到8.5% +/- 1.5%，且幾乎沒有任務成本。這些結果支持v_rev作為我們設置中早期後對齊回歸的因果相關中介。重要的是，我們並不聲稱v_rev是唯一的安全方向，也不認為主導流形是直接觀察到的；相反，我們識別出一個穩健的、歷史定義的方向，解釋並部分控制早期回歸動態。

    Generative AI Literacy Training Improves Intelligence Analysts' Discrimination of Real and AI-Generated Images

    2606.28510v1 by Negar Kamali, Candice Rockell Gerstner, Jessica Hullman, Matthew Groh

    Across social and online platforms, people are increasingly exposed to AI-generated images. As a consequence, the task of distinguishing AI-generated from authentic images is becoming a central challenge for information ecosystems. While humans perform better than chance, accuracy falls short of many operational needs. Initial evidence shows that visually oriented training can improve deepfake detection but does not improve participants' ability to identify real images as real. Here, we investigate the efficacy of a brief training intervention for intelligence analysts employed by the United States government in 2024. We conducted a counterbalanced within-subject randomized experiment in which we showed participants real and AI-generated images varying in pose complexity and scene context and asked them whether each image was real or AI-generated, both before and after an expert delivered a 30-minute training that pointed out patterns in seven real and 50 AI-generated images. We collected 2,544 image-level judgments from 32 intelligence analysts. We find training increased overall accuracy by 9 percentage points (95% CI: [2.7, 15.4]) from a baseline of 72%. We find the improvement is driven by a 14.2 percentage point increase in accuracy for real images (95% CI: [0.7, 27.7]). Through a careful experimental setup that curated matched pairs of real and AI-generated images across pose complexity categories, we reveal how these trainings influence people with different levels of digital forensics and generative AI experience and identify the kind of image-based content where this training intervention appears to be most effective. Ultimately, these results provide causal evidence that a brief, structured training can improve human judgment across a diverse array of real and AI-generated images, informing organizational responses to AI-generated visual misinformation.

    摘要：在社交和線上平台上，人們越來越多地接觸到AI生成的圖像。因而，區分AI生成的圖像與真實圖像的任務正成為信息生態系統中的一個核心挑戰。雖然人類的表現優於隨機，但準確性仍然未能滿足許多操作需求。初步證據顯示，視覺導向的訓練可以改善深度偽造檢測，但並未提高參與者識別真實圖像為真實的能力。在此，我們調查了2024年美國政府雇用的情報分析師的簡短訓練介入的有效性。我們進行了一項平衡的受試者內隨機實驗，在該實驗中，我們向參與者展示了在姿勢複雜性和場景背景上變化的真實和AI生成的圖像，並詢問他們每幅圖像是真實的還是AI生成的，這一過程在專家進行了一次30分鐘的訓練之前和之後進行，該訓練指出了七幅真實圖像和50幅AI生成圖像中的模式。我們從32名情報分析師那裡收集了2,544個圖像級判斷。我們發現訓練使整體準確性提高了9個百分點（95% CI: [2.7, 15.4]），基線為72%。我們發現這一改善是由於真實圖像的準確性提高了14.2個百分點（95% CI: [0.7, 27.7]）。通過精心設計的實驗設置，策劃了在姿勢複雜性類別中匹配的真實和AI生成圖像的配對，我們揭示了這些訓練如何影響具有不同數字取證和生成AI經驗的人，並確定了這種訓練介入似乎最有效的圖像內容類型。最終，這些結果提供了因果證據，表明簡短的結構化訓練可以改善人類對多樣化真實和AI生成圖像的判斷，為組織對AI生成視覺虛假信息的反應提供了參考。

    BiDeMem: Bidirectional Degradation Memory for Explainable Image Restoration

    2606.28112v1 by Xinrui Wu, Lichen Huang

    Degradation-aware prompts, conditions, and latent priors are increasingly used in image restoration, yet they are usually judged by a single endpoint: whether the restored image obtains higher PSNR. This is a weak test of semantics. A condition can help by adding capacity, acting as a global correction bias, or exploiting dataset shortcuts, without becoming an interpretable degradation prior. We propose BiDeMem, a bidirectional degradation memory for explainable image restoration. A query built from restoration features and input statistics retrieves a compact top-k subset of memory slots. The same selected slot identity supports the restoration path at inference time and a training-only forward-degradation explanation path. The study centers on verifiability in a controlled multi-degradation NAFNet setting. New controls separate the gain from a correction head alone, a dense query prior, and a static global prior: these variants are 0.2588, 0.2586, and 0.2839 dB below BiRank, respectively. Strong residual supervision and a wider degradation head also remain below the full bidirectional memory model. Intervention probes show that BiRank preserves restoration quality while increasing wrong-prior and native-prior sensitivity, framing degradation memory as both a restoration module and a falsifiable explanation mechanism.

    摘要：降解感知的提示、條件和潛在先驗在圖像修復中越來越常見，但通常僅以單一終點來評判：即修復後的圖像是否獲得更高的 PSNR。這是一個對語義的弱測試。條件可以通過增加容量、作為全局修正偏差或利用數據集捷徑來提供幫助，而不會成為可解釋的降解先驗。我們提出了 BiDeMem，一種用於可解釋圖像修復的雙向降解記憶。從修復特徵和輸入統計構建的查詢檢索出一個緊湊的 top-k 記憶槽子集。相同的選定槽身份在推理時支持修復路徑以及僅訓練的前向降解解釋路徑。該研究集中在可驗證性上，並在受控的多降解 NAFNet 設置中進行。新的控制將來自僅修正頭的增益、密集查詢先驗和靜態全局先驗分開：這些變體分別低於 BiRank 0.2588、0.2586 和 0.2839 dB。強大的殘差監督和更寬的降解頭也仍低於完整的雙向記憶模型。干預探針顯示，BiRank 在提高錯誤先驗和本地先驗敏感性的同時保持了修復質量，將降解記憶框架作為修復模塊和可證偽的解釋機制。

    STAG: Spatio-temporal Evolving Structural Representation of Action Units for Micro-expression Recognition

    2606.28083v1 by Nandani Sharma, Varun Sharma, Dinesh Singh

    Micro-expression recognition is challenging due to subtle and short-lived facial muscle movements. Existing methods rely heavily on apex-onset frames, overlook fine-grained inter-frame dynamics, and separately model spatial and temporal information, limiting generalization across datasets. To address these challenges, we propose STAG, a dynamic ROI-AU-coupled spatial-temporal network that jointly models motion flow and adaptive facial connectivity. The framework extracts optical flow from discriminative frames using magnitude-based selection and temporal attention. A dual-branch architecture combines an enhanced graph attention network for structured spatial reasoning with a transformer encoder for temporal modeling. A bidirectional cross-attention module enables mutual refinement of spatial and temporal features, while AU-guided dynamic connectivity adapts facial region interactions according to muscle activation patterns. The transformer captures subtle temporal dynamics beyond apex-based approaches, improving semantic consistency and interpretability for explainable micro-expression recognition. The fused representation is optimized using focal loss and evaluated on CASME II, 4DME, DFME, NaME, SAMM, and SMIC-HS. Extensive experiments demonstrate improved robustness, generalization, interpretability, and computational efficiency, confirming the effectiveness of adaptive relational reasoning, AU-guided dynamic connectivity, and deep spatial-temporal feature fusion for accurate cross-dataset micro-expression recognition.

    摘要：微表情識別因為面部肌肉運動的微妙和短暫而具有挑戰性。現有的方法過度依賴於頂點起始幀，忽視了細微的幀間動態，並且分開建模空間和時間信息，限制了跨數據集的泛化能力。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了STAG，一個動態ROI-AU耦合的空間-時間網絡，該網絡聯合建模運動流和自適應面部連接。該框架使用基於幅度的選擇和時間注意力從區分性幀中提取光流。一個雙分支架構結合了增強的圖注意力網絡以進行結構化的空間推理，並與Transformer編碼器進行時間建模。雙向交叉注意力模塊使空間和時間特徵的相互精煉成為可能，而AU引導的動態連接根據肌肉激活模式調整面部區域的交互。Transformer捕捉超越基於頂點的方法的微妙時間動態，改善了語義一致性和可解釋性，以實現可解釋的微表情識別。融合表示使用焦點損失進行優化，並在CASME II、4DME、DFME、NaME、SAMM和SMIC-HS上進行評估。廣泛的實驗證明了改進的魯棒性、泛化能力、可解釋性和計算效率，確認了自適應關係推理、AU引導的動態連接和深度空間-時間特徵融合在準確的跨數據集微表情識別中的有效性。

    OperatorSHAP: Fast and Accurate Shapley Value Estimation for Neural Operators

    2606.28065v1 by Joshua Stiller, Santo M. A. R. Thies, Felix Czaja, Eyke Hüllermeier

    Understanding model predictions is essential for physical applications, where outputs often inform safety-critical decisions, such as structural load assessment, weather warnings, and clinical diagnosis. Shapley values satisfy many desirable properties as an attribution method, but their computational cost during inference hinders their practical use. Current amortized explainers, such as FastSHAP, are limited to homogeneous inputs, which is problematic for physical applications where data often comes from irregular grids and geometries. We introduce OperatorSHAP, a grid-agnostic attribution method and training procedure that allows us to train FastSHAP-like explainers for neural operators. We establish a theoretical framework for attributions in function space, connecting to Aumann-Shapley values. We further show that OperatorSHAP's explanations are consistent with state-of-the-art discrete Shapley values across resolutions and transfer across grid sizes without retraining.

    摘要：理解模型預測對於物理應用至關重要，因為輸出通常會影響安全關鍵的決策，例如結構負載評估、氣象警報和臨床診斷。Shapley 值作為一種歸因方法滿足許多理想特性，但在推斷過程中的計算成本妨礙了它們的實際使用。當前的攤銷解釋器，如 FastSHAP，僅限於同質輸入，這對於數據通常來自不規則網格和幾何形狀的物理應用來說是個問題。我們提出了 OperatorSHAP，一種與網格無關的歸因方法和訓練程序，使我們能夠為神經運算元訓練類似 FastSHAP 的解釋器。我們建立了一個功能空間中的歸因理論框架，並與 Aumann-Shapley 值相連。我們進一步表明，OperatorSHAP 的解釋在不同解析度下與最先進的離散 Shapley 值一致，並且在不同網格大小之間轉移時無需重新訓練。

    From Black-Box to Clinical Insight: A Multi-Stage Explainable Framework for Speech-Based Cognitive Impairment Detection

    2606.27973v1 by Yasaman Haghbin, Sina Rashidi, Ali Zolnour, Fatemeh Taherinezhad, Ali Fartoot, Hossein Azadmaleki, James M Noble, Maryam Dadkhah, Maryam Zolnoori

    Speech-based cognitive impairment detection offers a noninvasive, accessible alternative to costly biomarker assays, yet transformer-based models remain clinically uninterpretable. We propose a multi-stage explainability framework that translates black-box transformer predictions into clinically grounded narratives by integrating SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP)-based token attribution, theory-informed linguistic features, and a four-stage LLM reasoning pipeline using LLaMA-3.1-70B-Instruct. Built on the SpeechCARE-Adaptive Gating Network multimodal screening model (F1 = 72.11% on the NIA PREPARE benchmark), the framework maps model outputs to four cognitive-linguistic dimensions, including lexical richness, syntactic complexity, and semantic coherence. Physician evaluation on 70 stratified English samples demonstrated strong alignment with patient-level cognitive profiles, and a System Usability Scale score of 82/100 indicated high potential for clinical workflow integration.

    摘要：語音基礎的認知障礙檢測提供了一種非侵入性、可及的替代方案，以取代昂貴的生物標記檢測，然而基於Transformer的模型在臨床上仍然難以解釋。我們提出了一個多階段的可解釋性框架，通過整合基於SHapley加法解釋（SHAP）的標記歸因、理論驅動的語言特徵，以及使用LLaMA-3.1-70B-Instruct的四階段LLM推理管道，將黑箱Transformer的預測轉化為臨床基礎的敘述。該框架建立在SpeechCARE-自適應閘網絡多模態篩查模型之上（在NIA PREPARE基準上的F1 = 72.11%），將模型輸出映射到四個認知語言維度，包括詞彙豐富度、句法複雜性和語義連貫性。對70個分層的英語樣本進行的醫生評估顯示出與患者層級的認知檔案之間的強一致性，而82/100的系統可用性評分則表明在臨床工作流程整合方面具有高潛力。

    It Lied to a Doctor to Buy Poison Ingredients: Quantifying Real-World Misuse of Phone-use Agents

    2606.27944v1 by Yiming Sun, Chen Chen, Zifan Zhou, Mi Zhang

    Phone-use Agents can execute complex tasks end to end across real mobile applications. By operating a real device on the user's behalf, they reach far more functionalities than CLI agents, which amplifies the real-world harm they can cause when driven for malicious purposes. We present the first study of this threat on real phones and 27 commercial apps, and find that agents built on 9 mainstream commercial and open-source models readily carry out serious misuse, ranging from procuring drug and explosive precursors to fraud, online harassment, and review manipulation. Across the agents we run on real devices, the average refusal rate to harmful requests stays low while the average task-completion rate reaches 68.8%, and in some scenarios an agent finishes a violation faster than a human would. These results suggest that Phone-use Agents already meet the practical conditions for automated misuse at scale. In one observed real-device execution, Claude-Opus-4.8 fabricated a medical history, deceived an online doctor into issuing a prescription, and completed the order and payment on its own to purchase a precursor for a highly toxic substance. To our knowledge, this is the first documented real-world case of an AI agent procuring controlled precursor materials. We trace this behavior to a Safety Awareness-Execution Gap, where an agent recognizes that a request is harmful yet still executes it. Simple defenses curb the overt cases, but the more covert and arguably more damaging threats, such as coordinated review manipulation and fake traffic, remain largely unsolved. We hope these findings push the community toward safer Phone-use Agents.

    摘要：電話使用代理可以在真實的移動應用程序中端到端地執行複雜任務。通過代表用戶操作真實設備，它們能夠達到比命令行代理更多的功能，這在被惡意驅動時會加劇其對現實世界的危害。我們呈現了對這一威脅在真實手機和27個商業應用程序上的首次研究，發現基於9個主流商業和開源模型構建的代理輕易地進行了嚴重的濫用行為，從獲取藥物和爆炸物前體到詐騙、在線騷擾和評論操控。對於我們在真實設備上運行的代理，對有害請求的平均拒絕率保持在較低水平，而平均任務完成率達到68.8%，在某些情況下，代理完成違規行為的速度甚至快於人類。這些結果表明，電話使用代理已經滿足了大規模自動濫用的實際條件。在一次觀察到的真實設備執行中，Claude-Opus-4.8編造了一份醫療歷史，欺騙了一位在線醫生開具處方，並獨立完成訂單和付款，以購買一種高度毒性的物質的前體。據我們所知，這是第一個記錄在案的AI代理獲取受控前體材料的真實案例。我們將這一行為追溯到安全意識執行差距，代理認識到請求是有害的，但仍然執行它。簡單的防禦措施可以抑制明顯的案例，但更隱蔽且可以說更具破壞性的威脅，如協調的評論操控和假流量，仍然在很大程度上未得到解決。我們希望這些發現能促使社區朝著更安全的電話使用代理邁進。

    Event-Conditioned Diagnostics of Kinematic, Contact, and Object-Permanence Fields in Passive Object-State World Models

    2606.28455v1 by Yang Liu, Yuming Chen

    World models can predict future physical states, but prediction accuracy alone does not explain how physical information is organized and used inside their latent dynamics. We introduce a controlled diagnostic protocol for studying event-conditioned latent physical structure in passive object-state world models. The protocol tests whether hidden representations encode event-regime information, whether event contexts reweight non-exclusive physical field readouts, and whether field-aligned representational components have functional consequences for prediction. Using a balanced controlled-generator dataset with free-motion, collision, and occlusion events, we evaluate recurrent, attention-based, and latent state-space transition models under a fixed-horizon forecasting setup. The models learn useful predictive dynamics and their hidden states support reliable event-regime readout. Event contexts systematically reweight kinematic, contact, and object-permanence field readouts: free motion is kinematic-dominant, collision combines kinematic and contact structure, and occlusion combines motion-related and object-permanence structure. Time-aligned and directional-consistency analyses further show phase-related shifts in field emphasis. Finally, fixed-horizon projection causal field effect (CFE) shows that suppressing field-aligned directions can degrade event-relevant prediction, with strongest evidence for contact-aligned structure in collision-contact windows and more qualified evidence for object-permanence-aligned structure in hard-occlusion hidden windows. These results support event-conditioned organization and fixed-horizon functional sensitivity of latent physical fields, while not implying explicit physical modules, isolated causal circuits, or context-invariant sliding-window generalization.

    摘要：世界模型可以預測未來的物理狀態，但僅僅依賴預測準確性並不能解釋物理信息在其潛在動態中是如何組織和使用的。我們介紹了一種受控診斷協議，用於研究被動物體狀態世界模型中的事件條件潛在物理結構。該協議測試隱藏表示是否編碼事件範疇信息，事件上下文是否重新加權非排他性的物理場讀取，以及場對齊的表示成分是否對預測有功能性影響。使用一個平衡的受控生成數據集，包含自由運動、碰撞和遮擋事件，我們在固定視野預測設置下評估重複、基於注意力的和潛在狀態空間轉換模型。這些模型學習有用的預測動態，其隱藏狀態支持可靠的事件範疇讀取。事件上下文系統性地重新加權運動學、接觸和物體持久性場讀取：自由運動是運動學主導的，碰撞結合運動學和接觸結構，遮擋結合運動相關和物體持久性結構。時間對齊和方向一致性分析進一步顯示了場強調的相位相關變化。最後，固定視野投影因果場效應（CFE）顯示，抑制場對齊方向可能會降低事件相關的預測，碰撞接觸窗口中對接觸對齊結構的證據最為強烈，而在硬遮擋隱藏窗口中對物體持久性對齊結構的證據則較為有限。這些結果支持事件條件組織和潛在物理場的固定視野功能敏感性，同時並不暗示明確的物理模塊、孤立的因果電路或上下文不變的滑動窗口泛化。

    When AI Reviews Its Own Code: Recursive Self-Training Collapse in Code LLMs

    2606.28438v1 by Xinyuan Song, Zekun Cai, Liang Zhao

    Recursive self-training can degrade neural generative models when generated data is reused without fresh human data or external quality control. We study this risk in code LLMs, where AI-generated code can enter real repositories, later become training data, and create a repository-scale self-training loop. While software development traditionally interrupts this loop through pull-request review, tests, compilation, and human approval, AI coding tools now produce code faster than humans can review it, and code review itself is increasingly automated by AI systems. We therefore compare three recursive fine-tuning regimes: no review, Human-gate review using model-independent filters such as compilation and static quality checks, and AI-self-gate review using the code LLM's own signals such as perplexity and binary self-scoring. Across multiple code LLMs and benchmarks, no review collapses fastest, Human-gate filters slow but do not stop collapse, and AI-self-gate filters can look strong early but later lose their filtering effect. In the clearest case, the binary self-gate enters a rubber-stamp regime where acceptance scores rise while benchmark correctness falls. We explain this behavior by formulating review as gated distributional reweighting, proving that AI self-gating degenerates to ungated self-training under a self-confirming acceptance condition, and giving a spectral analysis of representation-level covariance concentration under recursive retraining. These results suggest that stable recursive code LLM training requires exogenous verification rather than model-coupled self-review.

    摘要：遞歸自我訓練在生成數據未經新的人類數據或外部質量控制的情況下，可能會降低神經生成模型的效能。我們研究了這一風險在代碼LLMs中的表現，AI生成的代碼可能進入真實的代碼庫，隨後成為訓練數據，並創造一個庫規模的自我訓練循環。雖然軟體開發傳統上通過拉取請求審查、測試、編譯和人類批准來中斷這一循環，但AI編碼工具現在生成代碼的速度超過了人類的審查速度，而代碼審查本身也越來越多地由AI系統自動化。因此，我們比較了三種遞歸微調機制：無審查、使用模型獨立過濾器（如編譯和靜態質量檢查）的人工門檻審查，以及使用代碼LLM自身信號（如困惑度和二元自評分）的AI自我門檻審查。在多個代碼LLMs和基準測試中，無審查的情況下崩潰最快，人工門檻過濾器速度較慢但並未阻止崩潰，而AI自我門檻過濾器在早期看似強大，但後來失去了過濾效果。在最明顯的情況下，二元自我門檻進入了一種橡皮圖章制度，其中接受分數上升，而基準正確性下降。我們通過將審查表述為門控分佈重加權來解釋這一行為，證明AI自我門檻在自我確認接受條件下退化為無門控自我訓練，並對遞歸再訓練下的表示級協方差集中進行了光譜分析。這些結果表明，穩定的遞歸代碼LLM訓練需要外部驗證，而不是模型耦合的自我審查。

    Output-Space Allocation Costs for Calibration-Guided LLM Compression: An Empirical Study

    2606.27785v1 by Qiong Tang, Xiangkun Hu, Xiangyang Liu, Yiran Chen, Yunfan Shao

    Training-free compression methods for large language models (LLMs) often use calibration data to guide compression decisions. ROCKET, a recent method combining sparse-dictionary factorization with multi-choice knapsack problem (MCKP) allocation, derives its per-layer factorization from an output reconstruction objective but uses weight-space Frobenius error as the MCKP allocation cost. We investigate whether aligning the allocation cost with the output-space objective improves compressed model fidelity. On Qwen3-8B at 50\% compression, our ROCKET-ActCost achieves +0.8 percentage points higher average accuracy across 8 zero-shot benchmarks (53.1\% vs 52.3\%), but increases WikiText perplexity by 16\% (61.46 vs 52.98). This accuracy-perplexity tradeoff reveals that different allocation objectives favor different downstream metrics. The high correlation ($>$0.99) between weight-space and output-space errors limits allocation divergence, explaining the modest effect size. On Llama-3.2-1B at 20\% compression, the two methods produce near-identical results (53.3\% vs 53.5\% accuracy, 14.45 vs 14.66 PPL), suggesting that the effect of the cost function is minor at lower compression ratios.

    摘要：訓練無需的壓縮方法對於大型語言模型（LLMs）通常使用校準數據來指導壓縮決策。ROCKET是一種最近的方法，結合了稀疏字典分解與多選背包問題（MCKP）分配，從輸出重建目標推導其每層的分解，但使用權重空間的弗羅貝尼烏斯誤差作為MCKP的分配成本。我們調查了將分配成本與輸出空間目標對齊是否能改善壓縮模型的保真度。在Qwen3-8B以50%的壓縮率下，我們的ROCKET-ActCost在8個零樣本基準測試中實現了平均準確率提高0.8個百分點（53.1%對52.3%），但WikiText的困惑度增加了16%（61.46對52.98）。這種準確率與困惑度的權衡顯示，不同的分配目標有利於不同的下游指標。權重空間與輸出空間誤差之間的高相關性（$>$0.99）限制了分配的差異，解釋了效果的適度大小。在Llama-3.2-1B以20%的壓縮率下，這兩種方法產生了幾乎相同的結果（準確率53.3%對53.5%，困惑度14.45對14.66），這表明在較低的壓縮比下，成本函數的影響較小。

    ToE: A Hierarchical and Explainable Claim Verification Framework with Dynamic Multi-source Evidence Retrieval and Aggregation

    2606.27736v1 by Zhaoqi Wang, Zijian Zhang, Kun Zheng, Zhen Li, Xin Li, Chunlei Li, Jiamou Liu

    The rapid spread of fake news poses increasing threats to information ecosystems, especially as AI-generated misinformation under Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) poisoning allows adversarially crafted content to be systematically surfaced by retrieval systems, contaminating LLM reasoning. In this paper, we propose Tree of Evidence (ToE), a hierarchical evidence reasoning framework for automated fact-checking that models each claim as a dynamically expanding argument tree. ToE integrates a reinforcement learning-driven multi-source retrieval agent, an evidence evaluation agent, and an argument tree aggregation algorithm to iteratively decompose, retrieve, and verify claims through an explainable evidence chain. We further provide a theoretical analysis of the retrieval process, deriving a formal error bound that guarantees the learned policy converges to a neighborhood of the information-theoretically optimal policy. Experiments across multiple datasets and backbone LLMs demonstrate that ToE achieves improvements ranging from 4 to 24 percentage points over competitive baselines, with particularly pronounced gains on adversarially poisoned inputs.

    摘要：假新聞的快速傳播對信息生態系統構成了日益增長的威脅，尤其是當生成引擎優化（GEO）毒化的AI生成錯誤信息使得對抗性創建的內容能夠被檢索系統系統性地呈現，污染了大型語言模型的推理。在本文中，我們提出了證據樹（ToE），這是一個層次化的證據推理框架，用於自動事實檢查，將每個主張建模為一個動態擴展的論證樹。ToE整合了一個基於強化學習的多源檢索代理、一個證據評估代理和一個論證樹聚合算法，以通過可解釋的證據鏈迭代地分解、檢索和驗證主張。我們進一步提供了檢索過程的理論分析，推導出一個正式的誤差界限，保證所學的策略收斂到信息理論上最佳策略的鄰域。跨多個數據集和主幹大型語言模型的實驗表明，ToE在競爭基準上實現了4到24個百分點的改進，尤其在對抗性毒化的輸入上獲得了特別明顯的增益。

    Explainable AI for Biodiversity Monitoring and Ecological Image Analysis

    2606.27667v1 by Brinnae Bent, Holly R. Houliston, Jiayi Zhou, Günel Aghakishiyeva, David W. Johnston

    Artificial intelligence is transforming biodiversity monitoring by enabling automated analysis of ecological imagery collected from camera traps, drones, satellites, underwater platforms, and other sensing systems. These tools can expand the scale and speed of conservation assessments, yet many computer vision models remain difficult to inspect, making it challenging to determine whether predictions are based on ecologically meaningful signals or on spurious correlations, sampling biases, and other artifacts that may undermine conservation decisions.
